subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending utterance and speech, and hallowed beyond description and exposition, befitteth Him Who is the Object of all creation [3.5s]... ...It behooveth whosoever willeth to journey for the sake of God, and whose intention is to proclaim His Word and quicken the dead
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان و منزه از وصف و تبیان مقصود عالمیان را لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @Hands of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @knowledge; recognition of God
